'''Mahraccor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]]. He was the husband of [[Kallabow]] and the father of [[Sirrakuk]] and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Lowbacca]]. Mahraccor and his wife worked at the computer fabrication factory in [[Thikkiiana City/Legends|Thikkiiana City]], [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].
